items.text: Hi! Every number is made of blocks.
Add a block — now it's Two!
Five looks like the dots on dice.
Ten is two rows of five.
Tap a friend to hear its name!
Tap to meet each number friend!
Pick the number that matches the blocks.
Tap the taller tower — or = if they match!
Look at the stamps — whose are they?
Tap to watch the blocks split!
Hi! I'm Four. I have a fun trick!
I can also split into 3 and 1!
Your turn — tap the seam to split Six!
Next stage: Let's put them back together!
Tap a bright seam to split the tower!
What did the tower just split into?
How much is missing to match the big tower?
Watch the two friends, then tap the step they reach together!
Hi! I'm Two. Watch this magic staircase!
Two stands on step 2, Three stands on step 3.
Hold hands — together they reach step 5!
One and Three join up — which step do they reach?
Next stage: The Whole of Me!
Two and Three join up — which step do they reach?
One and Three join up — which step?
Higher! They reach a bigger step.
Lower! They reach a smaller step.
Drag one friend onto the other (or tap them one at a time)!
How many do these two friends make together?
Which pair joins together to make this number?
Tap to see every way Six can split!
Hi! I'm Six — I'm hiding lots of friend-pairs inside!
Any way you split me, I'm still Six!
Fruit splitter machine — how many fruits are left in the bowl?
Find ALL the pairs that make this number friend!
Tap EVERY friend who fits inside the big number!
That friend is too big to fit inside!
Right! One is too tiny to hold anybody.
Which block friend fills the empty space exactly?
Watch, then guess how many friends are hiding behind the bush!
Shh… two friends are hiding behind the bush!
Now three friends of Seven go hide…
Five friends! Shh… some duck behind the bush.
2 are hiding. We see 3 — but it's still 5!
Some are hiding again — how many this time?
Some friends are hiding! How many are behind the bush?
How many friends are hiding behind the bush?
What number goes in the empty circle?
Some blocks fly away — how many are left?
Tap to get to know the five-frame and the ten-frame!
I'm Five — like an open hand!
The frame has 3 already… 2 more to fill it up!
And I'm Ten — two rows of five, two hands!
Next stage: Ten and Some Ones!
Tap the empty boxes to fill the five-frame!
Tap the empty boxes to fill the ten-frame!
Which number friend pairs with the bright one to make 10?
How many more boxes to fill the ten-frame?
Tap to meet the teen numbers!
I'm Ten — two neat rows of five!
Here's Ten… and three loose friends.
Split Fifteen apart — there's always a Ten friend inside!
You've gone through the whole journey — replay any stage you like!
Tap the empty spots to build the number!
This number is 10 and how many more?
Ten and some ones join up — what teen number do they make?
A full ten and some ones — which number is it?
Tap a number, then tap its blocks to match!
Look in the mirror — two identical friends make how many together?
Break it evenly in half — how many in each half?
Two equal groups — add them up!
Peek at two equal groups, then say how many!
Tap the numbers, counting by two!
Match each group with its double!
Share the blocks into two equal rows — how many in each?
Three equal groups — add them up!
Peek at three equal groups, then say how many!
Tap the numbers, counting by three!
Match each group with its triple!
Share the blocks into three equal rows — how many in each?
Stand on 1 leg and count to 5!
Spot 1 red thing in your home.
Break a cracker in half — how much is each half?
Hold 1 pebble in your left hand, 2 in your right — join them, how many?
Line up 2 pairs of shoes — count how many shoes in all!
Stack 5 toys in a pile — how many ways can you split the pile into 2 groups?
Find 2 ways to share 4 candies between 2 friends.
Hide 2 of 5 toys behind your back — guess how many are hiding!
Play hide and seek as a family — count out loud to 10!
Hold up 3 fingers — how many more to make 5?
Count to 10 on your fingers, nice and loud!
Line up 10 beads in 2 rows of 5 like a ten-frame.
Count 12 stair steps — stop at step 10 and shout TEN!
Line up 13 pebbles: 10 in a row — how many are left over?
Count your socks by 2s — how many pairs?
Share 8 grapes fairly with a friend — how many each?
Count the wheels on 3 tricycles by 3s!
Share 9 crayons into 3 equal cups — how many in each?
